revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Country data Thailand/doc}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Siam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Thailand| ]] [[Category:Country data templates with documentation subpage|Siam]] [[Category:Country data templates wrapping another template]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Country data Thailand/doc}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Siam]] [[Category:Country data templates of Thailand| ]] [[Category:Country data templates with documentation subpage|Siam]] [[Category:Country data templates wrapping another template]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Siam%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
